_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: 11 days postinjection, upon macroscopic examination, significant lens opacity was observed, likely due to increased intraocular pressure. This along with slight proptosis that is typical of optic nerve glioma
details: Lens opacity and slight proptosis observed 11 days post-injection, typical of optic nerve glioma
